title: Crafting a Product Description
scenario: A company is launching a new product and needs to create a compelling product description. Write a prompt that generates a product description with a clear title, features, and benefits.
constraints: Must include a list of features
Must include a list of benefits

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the product description meet all the specified constraints?
Is the product description accurate and informative?
Does the product description highlight the key selling points?
